prompt: Traditional japanese emaki handscroll painting of an old unpaved earthen footpath winding through misty hills at dawn, soft pink and gold morning sky, the rising sun over the mountains, faint translucent yokai silhouettes dissolving into the morning mist along the path, extinguished paper lanterns on wooden posts beside the dirt road, edo period, no asphalt, no road markings, no modern elements, peaceful ending after the night parade, muted mineral pigments on aged washi paper, ink outlines, no text, no calligraphy, no seal stamps, no signature, no watermark
name: akatsuki
